investigator.value: Police fugitive recovery team led by Sam Tully pursuing warrant suspects
investigator.quote: The three warrant officers entered with quickness and precision, clearing hallways and rooms

social_world.value: Police department hierarchy with Internal Affairs investigating Banks for excessive force and rule violations
social_world.quote: Sgt. Banks had a much dreaded appointment with members of the Internal Affairs Bureau

investigator_wound.value: Banks facing Internal Affairs investigation for excessive force while trying to continue his fugitive pursuit duties
investigator_wound.quote: making forcible entry into residence without just cause and absent any exigent circumstances, also excessive force
